support.title: How can we help?
support.subtitle: Browse the FAQ or get in touch below.

faq.q1: How do I change my primary theme color?
faq.a1: Go to your Profile tab. Under Appearance settings, you'll find a 'Primary Color' section where you can choose a preset or pick a custom color.
faq.a2: Currently, social logins (Google, Apple, Github, Microsoft) are in development and will be activated in a future update.
faq.q3: What are the different user roles?
faq.a3: There are three roles: User, Manager, and Admin. Admins have access to global settings, Managers can edit app data, and Users have basic read access to app data.
